---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

Participation in the Silicon Sample Benchmark is by invitation. If you believe your team should be on the list, or you have questions about the submission process, get in touch with the core team.

Reach us at [janlukas.pfaender@gmail.com](mailto:janlukas.pfaender@gmail.com).

Clarifications of general interest are answered publicly on this website, so that all participating teams see the same information.
